summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Educational Content Creator Dashboard with 4 modules. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend UI fully functional, GPT-5.2 integration confirmed, and professional light theme design verified.
passed_tests: Module 1: Digital Books - LaTeX input, HTML preview, Render & Save functionality
Module 2: Comic Scripts - GPT-5.2 generation working, terminal output display
Module 3: Video Solutions - Question input, voiceover selection, Web Speech API TTS
Module 4: AI Video Prompts - 7-layer form, compile & save functionality
Professional light theme design with proper typography
MongoDB data persistence for all modules
